version_description: From 2022. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/pBr4bwLokJw.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
WHERE IT ENDS
As recorded by Bailey Zimmerman
(2022 release)



[Intro]
[ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
This is where it ends[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                                          [ch]E[/ch]
I've been down a few broken roads that I'm trying to mend[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
But this is where it ends[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
And I'm breaking down[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                                                       [ch]E[/ch]
You were lying when you said that you were trying to work things out[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
But now I'm broken down[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I went to battle for you always[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Fought for you on your worst days[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Then you tell me that you don't love me no more[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
You're the last thing that I thought I'd lose[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
All I ever wanted was to be loved by you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
I let you back in and I gave you a second chance[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Like a jet plane on a clear blue sky[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
Sun came shining down on all of your lies[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
I got too much pride to let that happen again[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
So this is where it ends[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Had to bury all your memories[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Couldn't see what everybody sees[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
A red flag said I should've walked out that door[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I went to battle for you always[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Fought for you on your worst days[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Then you tell me that you don't love me no more[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
You're the last thing that I thought I'd lose[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
All I ever wanted was to be loved by you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
I let you back in and I gave you a second chance[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Like a jet plane on a clear blue sky[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
Sun came shining down on all of your lies[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
I got too much pride to let that happen again[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
So this is where it ends, ends,  ends[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Now this is where it ends[/tab]


[Guitar Solo]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]


[Bridge]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
You're the best thing that ever happened to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]
You showed me what true love shouldn't be[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
I found myself the second I gave up on us[/tab]


[Out-Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
You're the last thing that I thought I'd lose[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
All I ever wanted was to be loved by you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
I let you back in and I gave you a second chance[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Like a jet plane on a clear blue sky[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
Sun came shining down on all of your lies[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
I got too much pride to let that happen again[/tab]
N.C.
So this is where it ends
